s: In 2019, Phillip Diehl suited up for COL as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 7.360, WHIP 1.640, SO 8, WAR 0.100.
In 2020, Phillip Diehl suited up for COL as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 10.500, WHIP 1.330, SO 4, WAR -0.100.
Changed teams after the previous season (COL -> CIN).
